tool_args.label: OMNY Descopes Railroads from Cubic Contract

payload.claim_text: MTA has decided to descope Commuter Railroads elements from Cubic OMNY contract and continue using Masabi for Mobile ticketing (e-Tix) and Scheidt & Bachmann for vending machines

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: Based on an MTA analysis and successful adoption of OMNY, business decision was made to reduce the quantity of NYCT CVMs from 1720 to 993

tool_args.label: OMNY Reorganized into Delivery and Operations Teams

payload.claim_text: The OMNY program continues to increase dedicated resourcing to support the two recently-formed OMNY teams: OMNY Delivery, which manages delivery of the OMNY capital project, and the OMNY Operations & Services team, which manages the day-to-day operations of the OMNY fare payment system

tool_args.label: Goal to Convert All NYCT Customers from MetroCard by End of 2024

payload.claim_text: The ultimate goal is to ensure all NYCT customers and ridership classes are able to transition from MetroCard to OMNY by the end of 2024

tool_args.label: Capital Program Impacted by CBD Tolling Litigation

payload.claim_text: Due to the risk of ongoing litigation delaying congestion pricing funding the MTA plans to commit $2.9 billion worth of capital projects in 2024

tool_args.label: Railroad Fare Collection Systems Past Expected Life

payload.claim_text: The current fare collection systems in use by the railroads were installed almost 25 years ago and cannot be maintained in a state of good repair beyond 2025
Coin recirculating system is not functioning per contract requirements, specifically with respect to issuing dime as change. Cubic is actively engaged to resolve the problem.

Campaign to replace Bus Validators to prevent cracking of Bus Validator housing and brackets is still not resolved. A technical solution to address this systemic defect has been identified and the final resolution is in mediation.

payload.raw_value_text: 22 safety incidents were reported in April 2024
